Wish for Wealth.effect: 100% more Currency found in the Mirage Area.
Wish for Wealth.notes: Multiplicative with juiced maps. Always take.

Wish for Foreknowledge.effect: 100% more Divination Cards found in the Mirage Area.
Wish for Foreknowledge.notes: Top pick for div card farming strategies.

Wish for Horizons.effect: 100% more Maps found in the Mirage Area.
Wish for Horizons.notes: Sustain + profit. Great for atlas completion.

Wish for Rust.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will spawn Ridan, of the Afarud.
Wish for Rust.notes: Drops The Black Barya. Boss-killer builds only.

Wish for Betrayal.effect: Some packs in the Mirage Area will be replaced with Syndicate members.
Wish for Betrayal.notes: High scarab yield. Needs Syndicate board setup.

Wish for Scarabs.effect: 80% more Scarabs found in the Mirage Area.

Wish for Treasures.effect: 80% increased Rarity of items found in the Mirage Area.

Wish for Hordes.effect: 20% increased Pack Size in the Mirage Area.
Wish for Hordes.notes: More monsters = more drops. Solid generic pick.

Wish for Terror.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will spawn a Pinnacle Atlas Boss from the Feared.
Wish for Terror.notes: High risk/reward. Needs strong boss-killer build.

Wish for Titans.effect: Mirage Area will contain 3 additional packs of Atlas Bosses.
Wish for Titans.notes: Atlas boss uniques. Good with Destructive Play.

Wish for Risk.effect: Mirage Area will contain 12 additional packs of difficult and rewarding monsters.

Wish for Meddling.effect: Mirage Area will contain 12 additional packs of Astral monsters.
Wish for Meddling.notes: Pure density, less reward per pack.

Wish for Troves.effect: An additional Unique Strongbox will appear in the Mirage Area.

Wish for Reflection.effect: A Reflecting Mist will appear on breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area.

Wish for Knowledge.effect: Players in Mirage Area gain 50% increased Experience.

Wish for Prosperity.effect: Mirage Area will contain an additional fountain of wealth.

Wish for Glyphs.effect: Portal Scrolls and Wisdom Scrolls found in Mirage Area will instead drop as other Currencies.
Wish for Glyphs.notes: Currency upgrade. Good in scroll-heavy maps.

Wish for Augury.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a cache of Stacked Decks.

Wish for Skittering.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a cache of Scarabs.

Wish for Strange Horizons.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Unique Map.
Wish for Strange Horizons.notes: Unique Map drop. Can be very valuable.

Wish for Souls.effect: Players in Mirage Area have Soul Eater.
Wish for Souls.notes: Fun combat buff but no loot value.

Wish for Momentum.effect: Players in Mirage Area have Onslaught and Adrenaline.

Wish for Power.effect: Enemies slain by Players in Mirage Area explode on death.

Wish for Gold.effect: Players in Mirage Area find 80% more Gold from slain Enemies.
Wish for Gold.notes: Gold value depends on vendor economy.

Wish for Foes.effect: Rare Monsters in the Mirage Area will have two additional modifiers.

Wish for Fortune.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a cache of Currency.

Wish for Uncertainty.effect: Mirage Area will be affected by 10 random Scarab modifiers.
Wish for Uncertainty.notes: Random. Can be great or terrible.

Wish for Providence.effect: The Nameless Seer will appear on breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area.

Wish for Wisps.effect: Enemies in Mirage Area have a chance to be empowered by Wildwood Wisps.
Wish for Wisps.notes: Extra juice if build handles it.

Wish for Godhood.effect: Players in Mirage Area have Echoing Shrine and Divine Shrine.
Wish for Godhood.notes: Powerful shrine effects. Good defensive option.

Wish for Pursuit.effect: Enemies in the Mirage Area have a 4% chance to release a Golden Volatile on death.

Wish for Jewels.effect: An additional Jewel Cache will appear in the Mirage Area.

Wish for Hindrance.effect: Enemies in the Mirage Area will be Chilled and Hindered.
Wish for Hindrance.notes: Defensive. Slows enemies for safer clearing.

Wish for Oases.effect: Mirage Area has patches of Oasis Ground.

Wish for Glittering.effect: Skill and Support Gems found in Mirage Area will have a random amount of Quality.
Wish for Glittering.notes: Quality gems. Can hit valuable quality.

Wish for Avarice.effect: Some packs in the Mirage Area will be replaced with Monsters that convert dropped Equipment to Gold.

Wish for Elements.effect: Players in Mirage Area have the Blessing of the Storm.

Wish for Distant Horizons.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a cache of Maps.

Wish for Eminence.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward an additional Unique Jewel.

Wish for Ancient Protection.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Unique Armour.

Wish for Ancient Armaments.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Unique Weapon.

Wish for Ancient Curios.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Unique Jewellery item.
Wish for Ancient Curios.notes: Unique jewellery drop. Can hit big.

Wish for Trinkets.effect: Jewellery found in Mirage Area will instead drop as Jewels.
Wish for Trinkets.notes: Jewellery-to-Jewel conversion. Useful for jewel farming.

Wish for Flame.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Coin of Power.
Wish for Flame.notes: Coin for imbuing level 20 gems. Valuable if needed.

Wish for Tides.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Coin of Knowledge.
Wish for Tides.notes: Coin for imbuing level 20 gems. Valuable if needed.

Wish for Sands.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Coin of Skill.
Wish for Sands.notes: Coin for imbuing level 20 gems. Valuable if needed.

Wish for Rebirth.effect: Monsters in the Mirage Area will have a chance to revive when slain.
Wish for Rebirth.notes: Double kill credit. Minor loot boost.

Wish for Binding.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Orbs of Binding.
Wish for Binding.notes: Low-value currency. Take if nothing else.

Wish for Regency.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Regal Orbs.

Wish for Connections.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Fusing or Jewellers Orbs.

Wish for Mosaics.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Chromatic Orbs.

Wish for Craftsmanship.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward a Five-Linked Body Armour.

Wish for Swiftness.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Boots.

Wish for Helms.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Helmets.

Wish for Mitts.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Gloves.

Wish for Protection.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Body Armours.
Wish for Protection.notes: Random rare body armour. Usually vendor.

Wish for Blades.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Melee Weapons.

Wish for Missiles.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Ranged Weapons.

Wish for Bastions.effect: Breaking the Astral Chain in the Mirage Area will reward Rare Shields.

Wish for Phantoms.effect: Some packs in the Mirage Area will be replaced with Monsters that cannot drop Equipment.
